task_completion.description: Remove all manual page breaks from the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent deleting manual page breaks, either by manually selecting and deleting them or by using the Find & Replace dialog to remove page breaks.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Heading 1' style to automatically include a page break before.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Paragraph Style dialog for 'Heading 1', specifically the 'Text Flow' tab with the 'Insert' break option checked, type set to 'Page', and position set to 'Before'.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Heading 2' style to keep with the next paragraph.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Paragraph Style dialog for 'Heading 2', specifically the 'Text Flow' tab with the 'Keep with next paragraph' option checked.

task_completion.description: Enable widow and orphan control for the 'Body Text' style.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Paragraph Style dialog for 'Body Text', specifically the 'Text Flow' tab with both 'Orphan control' and 'Widow control' options checked.

task_completion.description: Save the repaired document as 'thesis_repaired.docx' in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Save As' dialog with the filename 'thesis_repaired.docx' in the '/home/ga/Documents' directory, or the word processor's title bar displaying the new filename.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a graphical word processor interface rather than a terminal window running Python scripts or command-line tools.

integrity.description: The agent modified the document styles rather than applying direct formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening and modifying the 'Paragraph Style' dialogs for 'Heading 1', 'Heading 2', and 'Body Text', rather than just selecting text and applying direct formatting from the toolbar.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify the actual text content of the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show that the text of the thesis remains unchanged, with only formatting, styles, and page breaks being altered.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source document is '/home/ga/Documents/thesis_draft.docx'. The agent must save the repaired document to '/home/ga/Documents/thesis_repaired.docx'. The required style changes are: 'Heading 1' must have 'page_break_before' enabled (e.g., Insert Break Before), 'Heading 2' must have 'keep_with_next' enabled, and 'Body Text' must have 'widow_control' enabled. All manual page breaks must be removed.
